languages.text: {n}Увидев лицо убитой вами перебежчицы, Лария бледнеет, судорожно сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Ты убил{mf||а} наследницу Себериана?" {n}Не дожидаясь вашего ответа, она жестом отдает приказ блюстителям. Те, стремительно рассредоточившись, окружают вас и свиту, вскидывая оружие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: [драфт]{n}Увидев лицо убитой вами перебежчицы, Лария смертельно бледнеет, судорожно сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Ты убил{mf||а} единственную дочь Себериана?" {n}Не дожидаясь вашего ответа, она жестом отдает приказ блюстителям. Те, стремительно рассредоточившись, окружают вас и свиту, вскидывая оружие.{/n}
traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Увидев лицо убитой вами перебежчицы, Лария бледнеет, судорожно сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Ты убил{mf||а} наследницу Себериана?" {n}Не дожидаясь вашего ответа, она жестом отдает приказ блюстителям. Те, стремительно рассредоточившись, окружают вас и свиту, вскидывая оружие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the wardens, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

{n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the wardens, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

{n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the wardens, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Al ver el rostro de la traidora asesinada, Laria palidece y aprieta los puños convulsivamente.{/n} «¿Ha matado a la heredera de Seberian?». {n}Sin esperar respuesta, hace un gesto a los guardias, que os rodean al momento y os apuntan con sus armas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Al ver el rostro de la traidora asesinada, Laria palidece y aprieta los puños convulsivamente.{/n} «¿Ha matado a la heredera de Seberian?». {n}Sin esperar respuesta, hace un gesto a los guardias, que os rodean al momento y os apuntan con sus armas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}当看清被杀的叛徒的面容时，菈丽雅脸色煞白，双手不受控制地攥紧。{/n}“你杀了塞贝里安的继承人？”{n}未等你回答，她便向执法者们挥手示意。他们迅速散开，将你和你的随从团团围住，并将武器对准了你们。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当看清被杀的叛徒的面容时，菈丽雅脸色煞白，双手不受控制地攥紧。{/n}“你杀了塞贝里安的继承人？”{n}未等你回答，她便向执法者们挥手示意。他们迅速散开，将你和你的随从团团围住，并将武器对准了你们。{/n}

languages.text: {n}À la vue du visage de la traîtresse abattue, Laria blêmit et ses poings se serrent convulsivement.{/n} « Vous avez tué l'héritière de Seberian ? » {n}Sans attendre votre réponse, elle fait un signe aux prévôts qui vous encerclent aussitôt, leurs armes braquées sur votre entourage et vous-même.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}À la vue du visage de la traîtresse abattue, Laria blêmit et ses poings se serrent convulsivement.{/n} « Vous avez tué l'héritière de Seberian ? » {n}Sans attendre votre réponse, elle fait un signe aux prévôts qui vous encerclent aussitôt, leurs armes braquées sur votre entourage et vous-même.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Öldürülen hainin yüzünü görünce Laria sararıyor, yumruklarını istemsizce sıkıyor.{/n} "Seberian'ın vârisini mi öldürdünüz?" {n}Cevabını beklemeden hızla etrafını saran ve silahlarını sana ve maiyetine doğrultan infazcılara işaret ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Öldürülen hainin yüzünü görünce Laria sararıyor, yumruklarını istemsizce sıkıyor.{/n} "Seberian'ın vârisini mi öldürdünüz?" {n}Cevabını beklemeden hızla etrafını saran ve silahlarını sana ve maiyetine doğrultan infazcılara işaret ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als sie das Gesicht der toten Verräterin sieht, erbleicht Laria und ballt krampfhaft ihre Fäuste.{/n} "Ihr habt Seberians Erbin getötet?" {n}Ohne deine Antwort abzuwarten, gibt sie den Enforcern ein Zeichen, die sich rasch verteilen und ihre Waffen auf dich und dein Gefolge richten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als sie das Gesicht der toten Verräterin sieht, erbleicht Laria und ballt krampfhaft ihre Fäuste.{/n} "Ihr habt Seberians Erbin getötet?" {n}Ohne deine Antwort abzuwarten, gibt sie den Enforcern ein Zeichen, die sich rasch verteilen und ihre Waffen auf dich und dein Gefolge richten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}裏切り者の顔を見て、ラリアは顔を白くし、拳を握りしめた。{/n}「セベリアンの後継者を殺したの？」{n}あなたの返事待ちもせず、彼女は執行官たちに指示し、彼らはあなたを取り囲み、武器をあなたとあなたの側近に向けた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Upon seeing the face of the slain traitor, Laria pales, clenching her fists convulsively.{/n} "You killed Seberian's heir?" {n}Without waiting for your response, she gestures to the enforcers, who swiftly fan out around you, pointing their weapons at you and your retinue.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}裏切り者の顔を見て、ラリアは顔を白くし、拳を握りしめた。{/n}「セベリアンの後継者を殺したの？」{n}あなたの返事待ちもせず、彼女は執行官たちに指示し、彼らはあなたを取り囲み、武器をあなたとあなたの側近に向けた。{/n}
